title: Female Ninja Magic
writer: Sô Kuramoto, Sadao Nakajima, Fûtarô Yamada
actors: Mari Yoshimura, Yumiko Nogawa, Shigeru Tsuyuguchi
plot: In Osaka during the Edo period, ruler Sanada Yukimura was in losing position. Fearing Toyotomi's blood descendants would end, he impregnates one Shinano female ninja with the seed of Toyotomi in hopes of continuing the bloodline.
